name: Annie's Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs and lemon juice to the mixture; beat well.
4. Mix in the flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Stir in the chopped apples and nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Yield: 1 loaf
